name: ITracer
description: Port interface for observability tracing. Defines the contract for trace span management. Implementations bridge the domain core to a tracing backend (e.g. OpenTelemetry). Generic over SpanT, the opaque span handle type used by the concrete implementation.

generic_parameters.name: SpanT
generic_parameters.description: Opaque span handle type used by the concrete implementation (e.g. None for NoOpTracer, Span for OpenTelemetry adapter)

methods.name: start_span
methods.description: Start a trace span. Returns an opaque span handle passed back to end_span(), or null if span creation fails.

methods.name: end_span
methods.description: End a trace span with optional final attributes. Accepts the opaque span handle returned by start_span(), or null if no span was created.

behavioral_expectations: Must use abstract base class inheritance (ABC, Generic[SpanT]) — concrete implementations must subclass ITracer
Both methods are synchronous — tracing APIs (e.g. OpenTelemetry) do not perform I/O
start_span() must return null gracefully if span creation fails, never raise
end_span() must accept null span handles without raising
Attributes dict values should be simple types (string, integer, float, boolean)
A NoOpTracer implementation must exist that returns null from start_span and silently ignores end_span
Span names should follow dotted convention (e.g. 'workflow.execute', 'step.run')
